group_1.textRight: [flashEffect:flashRed1][chara:104700:effect_shake]Guh...
(The ground's so muddy... I can't move...!)
Kuroe-san...!
(I-I've gotta find a way to get us out of here...)

group_1.textLeft: You don't know anything. You can't make your@own decisions.
One day, your kindness will lead you to make@mistakes.
You'll do everything you can.
Until eventually, you'll even begin to doubt@that kindness.
You'll run away from battles you should fight.
You'll reject the things you should accept.
You're not qualified to be a Magical Girl.
You are absolutely not going to become the type@of Magical Girl that Tamaki-san is.
Now and in the future...
...your soul is unqualified to be a Magical Girl.
So you're going to become a pitch-black star@here.
That would certainly be the best "The End" for@your story.

group_1.textRight: [chara:104300:effect_7003_damage02][surround:1043A02][bgEffect:shakeSmall]Gh...!

group_1.textCenter: Think, think...! What can I do here...
I can clear this muck away and get Kuroe-san out@of here!
Even someone like me can do that...!

group_1.textLeft: You smell like "tomorrow," you little wretch...

group_1.textRight: [chara:104700:effect_7002_damage01][surround:1043A02][bgEffect:shakeSmall]Bwaagh!!
Kuroe-san...
I bet that the reason I became a Magical Girl...
...was so I could save you today!
[flashEffect:flashWhite2][surround:1047A01]Here goes nothing!
[chara:104700:effect_7003_damage02][surround:1043A02][bgEffect:shakeSmall]Guh...nng...!

group_1.textLeft: It's okay... Don't worry about me.
I'm so happy you're still alive...
That's a huge relief...
You're nothing like me, so please just...

group_1.textRight: Kuroe-san! Take my hand!

group_1.narration: I won't give up!@Maybe it's impossible,@but there's just as good a chance that it's not!
I'm really sorry, Kuroe-san.@I wouldn't have asked for so much@back then if I'd been stronger...
I might've messed up...
...but this time,@I'm not gonna let go of your hand@until I can finally thank you properly!
―Kuroe―@Why...are you...?
Because we're two peas in a pod!@We don't know anything,@so we desperately wanna be kind!
And I would never give up on myself!

group_1.textRight: [flashEffect:flashRed2][surround:1043A02][bgEffect:shakeSmall][chara:104700:effect_shake]Aagh!
Kuroe...sa...

group_1.textCenter: I guess I shouldn't have become a Magical Girl@after all...
I'm useless without Tamaki-san...@I can't help anybody.
If I hadn't become a Magical Girl...
...I could've just been grateful for being helped@myself.

group_1.narration: "Kuroe-san."
"Could you tell me something?"
"Who do you use magic for?"

group_1.textCenter: I use my magic to help people in need—@people right in front of me!
I wanna prove that we're not unlucky!

group_1.narration: "Alright. I'll take it from here."
―Iroha―@Kuroe-san.
―Kuroe―@Tamaki-sa...!
―Kuroe―@...
―Kuroe―@I knew it. I...
―Kuroe―@I'm sorry, Tamaki-san.
―Kuroe―@I clung to you so tightly@that I even made an illusion of you...
―Kuroe―@I'm so sorry...
―Kuroe―@I'm just one in a sea of Magical Girls you've saved.
―Kuroe―@There are tons of people out there@who matter more than I do.
―Kuroe―@I'm really, really sorry...
―Iroha―@Why are you apologizing?
―Kuroe―@You disappeared,@and now I don't know anything anymore.
―Kuroe―@It's like I got completely gutted one day.
―Kuroe―@Like my favorite song@suddenly vanished off the face of the Earth...
―Kuroe―@...and I couldn't remember@the tune I used to hum all the time.
―Kuroe―@Or like my favorite story@got erased out of existence.
―Kuroe―@And my heart, which was so deeply moved that day,@disappeared along with it.
―Kuroe―@Maybe everything I'd ever felt up 'til then@was just my imagination...
―Iroha―@I'm sorry I made you so sad...
―Iroha―@I know this is selfish of me, but...@I want you to smile, Kuroe-san.
―Iroha―@I'll work as hard as I can@to make that happen, okay?
―Iroha―@Someone as sweet as you@shouldn't be heartbroken like this...
―Kuroe―@But I—!
―Kuroe―@If I could be your reason to live,@I wouldn't care what happened to me!
―Kuroe―@I wish I could be what gave you a reason to keep going!
―Kuroe―@I wish it were me instead of you—@even if I died or turned into a Witch!
―Iroha―@ Don't say things like that.
―Iroha―@Please, Kuroe-san.
―Iroha―@Please don't ever say anything like that again.

group_1.textRight: ...I'm not an illusion, you know?
Because you believed in me...
Another miracle happened, even if it's just@a little one.

group_1.textLeft: Tamaki-san...
You saved me, but...
I couldn't understand anything. I couldn't become@anything, either.
Even though I'm a Magical Girl, I still have no idea@what's "right"...

group_1.textRight: That's okay, Kuroe-san. You don't have to,@you know?
It doesn't matter if you're a Magical Girl,@or if you're doing the right thing or not...
You're still you, Kuroe-san. Nothing is going@to change that.
Even if you don't change at all, you're not alone.
We're two peas in a pod as Magical Girls.
Just like you, I'm a cowardly girl who wants@to be kind.
We're so desperate all the time because@we don't know what to do...
We want to be kind, though...and really,@that's all we can strive for...

group_1.textLeft: (That girl said the same thing...@but I'm sure that...)

group_1.textRight: Kuroe-san— can I call you that?
If you stop being "Kuroe-san"...
...I won't be able to call your name anymore.

group_1.textLeft: ...Thank you, Tamaki-san.
I'm glad you found me.
Thank you for letting me call your name, too...
I...want to stay as myself...!

group_1.narration: As long as I don't forget who I am,@Tamaki-san will never disappear.
Because she was here, I can...

group_1.textLeft: Even if that means I'll be different from you...

group_1.textRight: Yeah...
Take me with you into tomorrow...

group_1.textLeft: Of course...!
The "me" that Tamaki-san knows...
And the "me" who knows her...
With that, I don't have to be scared of being@wrong...!
